description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the yasuyuky/rust-ssl-static Docker image and defines a single build stage. Add a job named static-build in the build stage that runs the command `DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get update && apt-get -y install libssl-dev` to install OpenSSL development libraries, followed by `make build-static-release` to compile a static release binary. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
